summary: Story-readiness-only review allows APP-149 carriers for App #133/#134/#135. No product code, owner API, package/run/session/evidence truth, credential, raw DOM, HAR, raw network, or profile material is changed.
reviewed_validation_summary: git diff --check, loom story --target . --json, loom suite validate --target . --item APP-149 --json, loom suite carrier validate --target . --item APP-149 --json, loom fact-chain --target . --json, and loom verify --target . --json passed for story-readiness-only scope.
follow_ups: Run owner-specific implementation tests and packaged App smoke in later implementation PRs that change UI or fixtures.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The story readiness captures user value, success paths, failure/unavailable states, sensitive-data boundary, non-goals, and owner truth boundaries for App #133/#134/#135.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: The PR only adds story readiness and Loom carriers; no product behavior or owner truth changes are implemented.
